send_to_cs: Send to CS for legal and fraud related inquires
Send to CS for product safety inquires and threats
Send to CS for website technical issues
escalate: ESC if cx claims bodily injury as result of a product
ESC if cx highlights dangers to health/safety as a result of product
templates: For all post-purchase & warranty inquiries use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
For discount code issues use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
For product info that you can't find on the site use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
If cx reach out about 90 qt cooler recall, use shortcut RCC
For custom order cancellation and edit requests, don't use CED, use the designated templates instead

conversation.message_text: Igloo: Welcome to Igloo! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Igloo: Hey this is Sarah, how can I help you?

Igloo: Still deciding? Use offer ATTJH3PTY8 at checkout. Shop now: 


Text back if you have any more questions!
I am needing replacement parts??

Igloo: I understand! We have replacement parts here: https://igloo.attn.tv/a6Ut5oCiyHke And again, if the part you need is not available on the website, it's best to text "SUPPORT" here, and you will be directed to another team member. You may also email us directly at customerservice@shop.igloocoolers.com or give us a call at 1-800-273-7024 from Monday through Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. PST. The team is happy to help!
I am just waiting for an answer from you guys. It might be still under warranty!!

Igloo: So sorry for the delay! We are dealing with an influx of support messages but this does not make your concern any less important. The team is working as hard as possible to address each issue promptly. I'm thankful for your patience and understanding. Our team will get back to you soon.
I was told maybe Monday that I would have an answer??
Igloo: I am so sorry. I understand how frustrating this can be. Please rest assured that your concern is important to us, and someone from our team will get in touch with you as soon as possible.
Should be pretty simple, Trailblazer cooler, made 2-24, bought 3-25, warranty or no! Need parts either way!

Template used: "No response from customer support - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 17:43:52.689

Igloo: I understand your I totally understand the frustration and I really want to help you with this. If your Igloo product failed due to defects in material or workmanship and falls within the guidelines of the Warranty policy, you may submit a claim here: https://igloo.attn.tv/au4j5fkHK-LW 

You can also check out our warranty policy here: https://igloo.attn.tv/ayHhOPJ2wEGU 

However, for replacement parts I will just ask you to please be patient for our team to come back to you.

I'm afraid it might be due to my system's limited access that I'm unable to view the estimated shipping date assigned to your pre-order. Can you please check if this information is available in the order confirmation email we sent? Make sure to check your spam and promo folders, sometimes our emails end up there. 

If this helps, you can also check out our Pre-Order policy here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aUkIvhkJl7eD Please let me know if you have further questions or need my assistance. I'm happy to help!
